data.title: RED: Tests for suggest-test-index.sh post-failure script
data.description:
Create tests/scripts/test-suggest-test-index.sh with RED tests for CI failure suggestion script (SC3, SC4).

## Test Cases
- test_creates_suggestion_on_failure: given failing test + changed source file where test fuzzy-matches source, appends suggestion to .test-index-suggestions
- test_dedup_against_test_index: suggestion already in .test-index → not appended
- test_dedup_against_suggestions: suggestion already in .test-index-suggestions → not appended
- test_creates_file_if_absent: .test-index-suggestions does not exist → created on first write
- test_multi_file_emits_per_pair: 3 changed files, 1 failing test fuzzy-matches 1 source → only 1 suggestion
- test_ambiguous_omitted: failing test matches no source file by fuzzy match → no suggestion emitted
- test_rebase_head_filter: during rebase, files from incoming branch excluded from suggestions
- test_format_matches_test_index: output line matches source/path.ext: test/path.ext format

## Test Approach
Each test creates temp .test-index, temp .test-index-suggestions (or absent), temp changed files list, and temp failing test output. Runs suggest-test-index.sh with these inputs and asserts file contents and exit codes.

## RED Marker
.test-index: plugins/dso/scripts/suggest-test-index.sh: tests/scripts/test-suggest-test-index.sh [test_creates_suggestion_on_failure]

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-suggest-test-index.sh
- [ ] At least 8 test functions
  Verify: grep -c "^test_" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-suggest-test-index.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 8)}'
- [ ] .test-index RED marker exists
  Verify: grep -q "suggest-test-index" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
